Game: The Great Battle III 1993-03-26T00:00:00-07:00 The Great Battle III is a scrolling brawler featuring the F91 Gundam, Kamen Rider, Ultraman and the Great Battle series's original character Fighter Roar. The game is set in a fantasy world and the characters all use medieval weaponry in battle. The game is the third in the series of Great Battle brawler/shooter games, and the seventh Compati Hero Series game for the Super Famicom (of seventeen). <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/2aad3927-2443-4e85-b50d-5845d8cf330c.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/8769415a-7863-436e-9a2c-1a99687c33a5.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/6f5dd87c-933e-44cb-8031-6c17cc7bb613.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/f9bad5b0-bd1e-4b07-97af-ece52b259d9b.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/a3bcf384-a912-479f-bf28-5329265bf77a.JPG http://images.launchbox-app.com/1386f9bd-1963-4150-ad23-c9b6c53c3bdd.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/b2eb986c-c39f-4d38-a5b7-0a1d240adf9f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/c79412fb-ef4b-4060-8b0d-8793393a2688.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/30e23ab0-0ace-41ae-bb35-86049c13d67e.png 5 Action Sun L Banpresto Co., Ltd.
